race.comment: THIRTEEN UNDER (4) has strung three wins together on the bounce with winning hoop Morrison in the stirrups for all three victories. No reason why he can't continue the picket fence here. RASHFORD (3) is having his first run for the new stable but will find this easier than recent efforts and any push in betting must be noted. STADIUM OF LIGHT (1) will be better with that first-up run now in the locker and gets some weight off with the 1.5kg claim. Watch for sharp improvement. TALONS (11) saves his best form for this course and distance and will be cherry-ripe fit for this. In the mix. NEW LEVEL (6) next in line in a race with a long tail.
